displayText.headline: Precision That Redefines Cancer Care
displayText.subheading: Harnessing Next-Generation surgical robotics and targeted radiation therapies to eliminate tumors with sub-millimeter accuracy.
displayText.footer: Leading-edge cancer care units at Saket, Vaishali & Patparganj.

style: Ultra-premium dark mode, obsidian glass reflection, high-tech spotlight.
description: Deep charcoal background. A sleek, metallic surgical robotic arm is positioned on a highly reflective black glass platform, caught in a dramatic pinpoint spotlight highlighting its precise carbon-fiber joints.
